mapper.select: SELECT p.id AS id, p.dept_sub_id AS deptSubId, p.worker_id AS workerId, p.date AS date, p.user_id AS userId, p.maximum AS maximum, p.description AS description, p.file_path AS filePath, w.name AS workerName, ds.name AS deptSubName, d.name AS deptName, d.id AS deptId, gu.user_name AS userName FROM gas_worker_plan p LEFT JOIN gas_worker w ON p.worker_id = w.id LEFT JOIN medical_dept_sub ds ON p.dept_sub_id = ds.id LEFT JOIN medical_dept d ON ds.dept_id = d.id LEFT JOIN gas_user gu ON p.user_id = gu.id WHERE p.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gas_worker_plan (worker_id, dept_sub_id, date, user_id, maximum, description) VALUES (#{workerId}, #{deptSubId}, #{date}, #{userId}, #{maximum}, #{description})
mapper.update: UPDATE gas_worker_plan SET worker_id = #{workerId}, dept_sub_id = #{deptSubId}, date = #{date}, user_id = #{userId}, maximum = #{maximum}, description = #{description} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM gas_worker_plan WHERE id IN
#{id}
